text.title: django-quality-queries Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to inventory N+1 queries, apply selector-layer fixes, add indexes, and lock counts with regression tests.

step.name: inventory-hot-endpoints
step.input: access log / observability dashboard, top 20 endpoints by req/min
step.action: List endpoints sorted by traffic × p95-latency product. Mark every list endpoint (collection-returning) as a candidate for audit.
step.output: ordered list of endpoints to profile
step.decision-gate: If the top list endpoint serves < 10 req/min and p95 < 200 ms, deprioritise — diminishing returns.

step.name: profile
step.action: Reproduce request in dev with Debug Toolbar active OR enable nplusone middleware with `NPLUSONE_RAISE=True` in test settings and run the endpoint test.
step.output: SQL query log + duplicate count + grouped-by-template view
step.decision-gate: If query count is `<= target (list ≤5, detail ≤10)` AND no duplicates — skip endpoint.

step.name: fix-in-selector
step.input: existing queryset call site (views.py / admin.py / tasks.py)
step.action: Move queryset construction into `selectors.py`. Apply select_related (FK / OneToOne) and prefetch_related (M2M / reverse FK / GFK). Use Prefetch(queryset=...) when relation needs filtering or its own select_related.
step.output: updated `selectors.py`; views become thin (one call to selector)
step.decision-gate: Run Debug Toolbar / nplusone again — count must drop to target.

step.name: indexes
step.input: list of WHERE / ORDER BY clauses observed in step 2
step.action: Add `models.Index(...)` entries for hot single-column and composite filter+sort patterns. Generate `manage.py makemigrations`. Run `EXPLAIN ANALYZE` on staging to confirm index usage.
step.output: migration adding indexes; EXPLAIN output saved to report
step.decision-gate: If EXPLAIN still shows Seq Scan, query shape mismatches the index — adjust column order.

step.name: lock-with-tests
step.action: Add a pytest using `django_assert_num_queries(N)` (or `assertNumQueries`) around the endpoint call. N is the post-fix count plus 0-1 tolerance for auth lookups.
step.output: regression test in `tests/` that fails on reintroduction
step.decision-gate: Test must fail when the optimisation is deliberately removed (sanity check).

step.name: emit-report
step.action: Render `templates/audit-report.md` with per-finding rule_id + before/after counts. Run `scripts/validate-django-quality-queries.py` against the report.
